title: iPSC gDNA Extraction for Screening Edited Clones
author: Celeste M M. Karch
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.x8afrse

steps.title: Spin 96 well PCR plate at...
steps.instruction: Spin 96 well PCR plate at 3800 rpm for 00:30:00 at 4 °C .

steps.title: Pipet off supernatant
steps.instruction: Pipet off supernatant. If worried about removing cells, transfer supernatant with multichannel pipet into new PCR plates and store at -20 °C until DNA extraction is complete.

steps.title: To cell pellet (often not visible),...
steps.instruction: To cell pellet (often not visible), add 50 µL QuickExtract DNA Solution ( Epicentre Technologies QE09050 ).

steps.title: Incubate plate in thermocycler at 98 °C for 00:02:00
steps.instruction: Incubate plate in thermocycler at 98 °C for 00:02:00 .

steps.title: Place plate in -20 °C for...
steps.instruction: Place plate in -20 °C for storage, until ready to use for further screening experiments .
